text.title: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: verification_method populated with a typed value
idempotency_store populated with a typed value
processing_path populated with a typed value
dead_letter_url populated with a typed value
replay_safety_test populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
